name: Brown Sugar Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar, white sugar, vegetable shortening, and butter until well combined.
2. Add the eggs one at a time to the mixture, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually combine the self-rising flour and plain flour with the milk, alternating additions with the batter.
4. Stir in the vanilla and maple flavoring, then mix in the chopped pecans.
5. Pour the batter into a lightly greased and floured tube pan.
6. Bake at 250°F for 2 hours or at 325°F for 1.5 hours.
7. Do not open the oven door before the cooking time is up.
